positive: Minimalist graphic design featuring a highly stylized pair of majestic mountain llamas traversing a field of glowing abstract geometric florals. The llamas are depicted with clean, crisp silhouettes and elegant lines. The background should be a deep indigo and midnight blue gradient, providing high contrast against the bright, glowing floral elements which utilize emerald green, electric cyan, and pale gold accents. Composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a single, impactful print placement on apparel. Clean vector art aesthetic meets ethereal cosmic energy. Flat, graphic, high contrast, sharp focus, suitable for screen printing.
